Listing files in the current directory.
The file donut.html contains HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code for a simulation of a 3D rotating donut using the Canvas API.

The file donut.html contains an HTML document that sets up a canvas element and includes JavaScript code to render a simulated 3D rotating donut on the canvas using mathematical equations and perspective projection.
